name: zk-circuit-auditor-mcp
description: MCP server that audits zero-knowledge circuits (Circom, Noir, Halo2) for soundness and constraint bugs using the Cysic Minimax model.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check bin/demo.js && node --check src/cysicClient.js && node --check src/auditor.js && node --check src/prompts.js && node --check src/zkwc.js && node --check src/offlineAuditor.js
